casepack.title: Continuity Theory — 3 Dynamical Systems (Tier-2)
casepack.description: Continuity theory domain closure demonstrating GCD kernel applied to 3 dynamical systems with 5-channel trace. Stable oscillator (near-Stable, Watch due to S gate), damped oscillator (Collapse from energy loss), chaotic system (deep Collapse). Demonstrates continuity measurement across system trajectories.

run_intent.notes: Exercises the continuity theory closure with 3 dynamical systems: stable oscillator (near-perfect channels, Watch — S=0.285 above Stable gate, heterogeneity gap nearly zero), damped oscillator (Collapse from energy dissipation, omega=0.350), chaotic system (deep Collapse omega=0.630, highest entropy). Illustrates that Stable regime is structurally rare (12.5% of Fisher space) — even a 'stable oscillator' is classified Watch by the frozen gates.
